name: Nidaros Sparebank
summary: Nidaros Sparebank, a savings bank, provides loans, savings, insurance, pension products, and payment services for private and corporate customers in Norway. The company offers payment and card services, and mobile and online banking services; and car loans, mortgages, and loans to other vehicles; and savings and pensions, as well as investor services. It also provides bank guarantees, construction loans, overdrafts, leasing, and corporate loans; and children, auto, death fall, health, building, home, property, income, critical illness, disability, UNG, liability, agriculture, commercial vehicle, craft, lice, breeding and crew, staff, travel, and injuries insurance. The company was founded in 1858 and is based in Kl√É¬¶bu, Norway.
